If you meant order volume or a specific performance metric by city, let me know and I can refine the query."}

2026-04-15T23:42:59.478Z	fa2b9110-a495-4c14-a916-c3664dd4e95e	INFO	SELVY_DEBUG execute-sql {"metric_id":"orders_analytics","variation_id":"avg_items_per_order","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_items_per_order,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_units_per_order,
  SUM(CAST(our_price AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_order_value
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST('2026-03-01' AS DATE) AND CAST('2026-03-31' AS DATE) AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id
ORDER BY marketplace_id ASC"}
